name: DocLayNet
data_format: COCO page-layout boxes + PNG pages + extra PDF/JSON
notes: Human-annotated layout regions; strongest current public source for region recovery and layout parsing assistance.

name: PubLayNet
data_format: COCO page-layout boxes + page images + released page PDFs
notes: Useful weak layout booster, but keep separate from gold evaluation.

name: PubTables-1M
data_format: table detection/structure annotations + page images/table crops
notes: Strong table-region specialist source, not a full layout recovery corpus by itself.
